title.zh: 气血养颜：气血充足才能容光焕发
title.en: Qi-Blood Beauty: Radiance from Sufficient Qi & Blood

description.zh: 气血是美容的根本，掌握气血养颜的方法，让面色红润、皮肤润泽
description.en: Qi-Blood is the foundation of beauty, master methods for radiant complexion

zh.text: 中医认为"气血为人之本"，气血充足则面色红润、皮肤润泽、精神饱满。气血不足则面色萎黄、皮肤干燥、容易衰老。想要容光焕发，必须从调理气血入手。
气为血之帅，血为气之母。气推动血液运行，血滋养肌肤脏腑。气血调和，则容颜美丽；气血失调，则容颜憔悴。

items: 黄芪：补气升阳，改善面色
党参：补中益气，增强体质
山药：补脾益气，滋养肌肤
红枣：补气养血，红润面色
鸡肉：温中补气，强健体魄

zh.text: 四物汤是补血养颜的经典方，由当归、熟地、白芍、川芎组成，被称为"女人养血第一方"。
八珍汤是气血双补的经典方，由四物汤加四君子汤组成，适合气血两虚者。

zh.title: 当归黄芪养颜汤
zh.instructions:
1. 鸡肉切块焯水
2. 当归、黄芪洗净
3. 所有材料放入炖盅
4. 炖煮1.5小时
5. 温服，每周2-3次
6. 补气养血，改善面色

items: 规律作息：早睡早起，保证睡眠
适度运动：促进气血运行
情绪调节：保持心情舒畅
饮食调理：均衡营养，多吃补气血食物
避免过度：不过度劳累，不过度减肥

zh.text: 温馨提示：气血养颜需要循序渐进，不可急于求成。严重气血不足者应在医师指导下调理，配合药物治疗效果更佳。

en.text: TCM believes "Qi and Blood are the foundation of life." Sufficient Qi-Blood gives rosy complexion, moist skin, and abundant energy. Qi-Blood deficiency causes sallow complexion, dry skin, and premature aging. To radiate beauty, start with regulating Qi and Blood.
Qi commands Blood, Blood nourishes Qi. Qi drives blood circulation, Blood nourishes skin and organs. Harmonious Qi-Blood gives beautiful appearance; disordered Qi-Blood causes haggard look.

items: Codonopsis: Tonifies middle Qi, strengthens body
Yam: Tonifies spleen Qi, nourishes skin
Red dates: Tonifies Qi-Blood, reddens complexion
Zusanli: Key point for tonifying middle Qi
Angelica: First herb for tonifying blood
Donkey-hide gelatin: Tonifies blood, nourishes Yin
Black sesame: Tonifies liver-kidney, benefits essence-blood
Red dates: Excellent for tonifying blood
Xuehai: Key point for tonifying blood

en.text: Si Wu Tang is the classic blood-tonifying formula, composed of Angelica, Prepared Rehmannia, White Peony, and Chuanxiong, known as "women's first blood-tonifying formula."
Ba Zhen Tang is the classic Qi-Blood dual-tonifying formula, combining Si Wu Tang with Four Gentlemen Decoction, suitable for those with both Qi and Blood deficiency.

en.title: Angelica Astragalus Beauty Soup
en.instructions:
1. Cut chicken, blanch
2. Wash angelica and astragalus
3. Place all in stewing pot
4. Stew for 1.5 hours
5. Serve warm, 2-3 times weekly
6. Tonifies Qi-Blood, improves complexion

items: Regular routine: Early to bed, early to rise
Emotional balance: Stay happy and relaxed
Dietary care: Balanced nutrition, eat Qi-Blood tonifying foods
Avoid excess: Don't overwork, don't extreme dieting

en.text: Note: Qi-Blood beauty requires gradual progress. Those with severe deficiency should consult a physician for combined treatment with medication for best results.
